day3_bumps.type: Short thread reply (reply to original email thread)
day3_bumps.template:
[First name],

Just wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

[One sentence restating specific issue — e.g. 'The Not Secure warning on [URL] is still showing.']

[Your name]
day3_bumps.rules: 3-4 lines only. Same thread. Not a restatement — a brief bump. IMAP before each.
day3_bumps.brain_run_required: Friday 2026-05-09 — BRAIN generates per-lead Day-3 copy from Batch 5 data.

day7_new_angle.note: Second Tuesday in sequence — peak yield day.
day7_new_angle.type: New pain point. Fresh email — NOT a thread reply.

pivot_rules.if_day0_was_ssl: Day-7: Google ranking impact of Not Secure ('Not Secure sites rank below HTTPS in local search') OR missing/incomplete Google Business Profile. NEVER repeat SSL angle.
pivot_rules.if_day0_was_mobile: Day-7: SSL (if HTTP), OR missing tap-to-call button, OR specific competitor who IS mobile-friendly.
pivot_rules.if_day0_was_no_website: Day-7: competitors ranking for the keyword, OR estimated missed enquiries per month.
pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a different pain point. Tom's conversion came from a genuine new angle.

day7_new_angle.brain_run_required: Tuesday 2026-05-13 morning — BRAIN generates per-lead Day-7 copy.
